description: The contents of a summons document

type.description: Sub-type of summons.  For example, indicates specific first hearing summons( such as MCA, WS, EW) or SJP_REFERRAL etc...

issueDate.description: The court date and time that the summons is for

offences.description: The offences for which a defendant is being summonsed.  Only applies to First Hearing and Referral summons

caseReference.description: The reference to the individual case that is the subject of the hearing (case URN or ARN)

referralContent.description: The specific content for summons to an SJP referral

applicationContent.description: The specific content for summons to an application hearing

breachContent.description: The specific content for summons to a breach application hearing

prosecutorCosts.description: Prosecutor cost will be surfaced in the summons and defendant is liable to pay this amount.  Should be captured as £300.00 or english string when cost is zero

welshProsecutorCosts.description: Prosecutor cost will be surfaced in the summons and defendant is liable to pay this amount when cost is in welsh.  Should be captured as £300.00 or welsh string when cost is zero

personalService.description: Flag to indicate if summons will be served to the defendant in person (delivery by hand)

amendedDate.description: Populated when the summons is an amendment to a previously issued summons. The document template must display 'Amended on [date]' when this field is present.
